data.title: Samsonite leans on ecommerce growth as wholesale demand weakens
data.description: Samsonite said ecommerce and direct sales will remain central to its strategy as more consumers shift to buying online.

data.title: Alibaba ties AI push to cloud growth, ecommerce overhaul
data.description: Alibaba’s Q3 results underscore a broader shift across digital commerce and enterprise technology.

data.title: HealthWarehouse.com goes back in the black as B2B growth lifts sales in 2025
data.description: The online pharmacy reported net sales of $49.0 million for the year ended Dec. 31, up from $33.6 million in 2024.

data.title: Dollar General, Five Below each seek to enhance omnichannel experiences
data.description: Although neither Dollar General nor Five Below disclosed ecommerce-specific sales for Q4, they each addressed comparable or same-store sales, which account for online transactions and give a sense of the retailers' omnichannel advancements.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: Why Walmart's view of agentic commerce is evolving
data.description: An executive overseeing AI efforts sees Walmart's AI assistant Sparky creating 'additive' ecommerce activity with ChatGPT.
